info.name: Logistics System API - Regression
info.description: 跨境物流作业系统回归联调集合，覆盖用户、订单、站点、仓储、分拣、运输、追踪、异常、调度等核心链路。

body.raw:
{
  "rule_name": "Postman江苏苏州规则",
  "country": "中国",
  "province": "江苏",
  "city": "苏州",
  "district": "",
  "route_code": "CN-JS-SZ-POSTMAN",
  "station_id": {{dest_station_id}},
  "priority": 100,
  "description": "Postman分拣规则"
}

{
  "order_id": {{order_id}},
  "vehicle_id": {{vehicle_id}},
  "driver_id": 0,
  "start_point": "上海测试站",
  "end_point": "苏州测试站",
  "distance": 1.0,
  "cost": 120.0,
  "remark": "Postman运输任务"
}

exec: pm.test("Monitor task list success", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
pm.test("Cost task list success", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
pm.test("Cost task detail success", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });

pm.test("Batch status update success", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });

{
  "plan_name": "Postman运输计划",

exec: pm.test("Transport plan list success", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
pm.test("Transport plan detail success", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
pm.test("Assign order to plan success", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
pm.test("Plan status update success", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });
